meaning: n.男仆,男勤杂工,<主英>实习医生
examples: Or so many experts are coming to believe, including Ms. Houseman.
Tell Mr. Smith we will start to serve as soon as President Houseman arrives.
If the female can earn more than her husband, it is wise for husband to become houseman.
"It's really tricky to ascribe changes in employment to trade, " says Susan Houseman, a senior economist at the W.E.
Eric Houseman, president and chief operating officer of Red Robin Gourmet Burgers Inc.
